creator: freebsd.asc@schwarzes.net
text:
gtk-gnutella port build stops with an error.

asc@tapir:~ $ cat /var/db/ports/gtk-gnutella/options 
# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# No user-servicable parts inside!
# Options for gtk-gnutella-0.96.6
_OPTIONS_READ=gtk-gnutella-0.96.6
WITH_X11=true
WITH_GTK2=true
WITH_TLS=true
WITHOUT_NLS=true
WITH_IPV6=true
WITHOUT_DBUS=true
WITHOUT_SQLITE=true
WITHOUT_DEBUG=true
WITHOUT_PORTABILITY=true

cc -o gtk-gnutella  main.o if/bridge/ui2c.o  if/bridge/c2ui.o  if/gnet_property.o  if/gui_property.o -Lshell -lshell  -Lcore -lcore  -Ldht -ldht  -Lui/gtk -lgtk-common -lgtkx -lgtk-common  -ldht -lcore -Llib -lshared -Lsdbm -lsdbm -lshared  -pthread -L/usr/local/lib -lgtk-x11-2.0 -lgdk-x11-2.0 -latk-1.0 -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lgio-2.0 -lXext -lXrender -lXinerama -lXi -lXrandr -lXcursor -lXcomposite -lXdamage -lcairo -lpangoft2-1.0 -lX11 -lXfixes -lpango-1.0 -lm -lfreetype -lz -lfontconfig -lgobject-2.0 -lgmodule-2.0 -lglib-2.0   -L/usr/local/lib -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -L/usr/local/lib -lxml2 -L/usr/local/lib -ldbus-1 -L/usr/local/lib -lgnutls   -lz -lm
